citations.content: PhD research on digital phenotyping and passive behavioral sensing using smartphone and wearable data to detect mental health signals; provides clinically validated behavioral markers; research relationships at Boston Children's Hospital / HMS for clinical monitoring partnerships.

limitation.value: Passive signals are siloed across platforms; no system reads them together or longitudinally.

citations.content: Passive signals are siloed across platforms; no system reads them together or longitudinally.

limitation.value: Insights are population-based; individual baselines and deviations go unmodeled.

citations.content: Insights are population-based; individual baselines and deviations go unmodeled.

limitation.value: No system connects passive early signals to safe, timely, proportionate intervention.

citations.content: No system connects passive early signals to safe, timely, proportionate intervention.

tagline.value: No logging. No check-ins. No behavior change.

citations.content: No logging. No check-ins. No behavior change.

description.value: SIGNAL continuously and invisibly ingests passive behavioral and biometric data from wearables (e.g., Oura, Whoop, Apple Watch) without requiring user input, enabling background monitoring of mental health signals.

citations.content: SIGNAL continuously and invisibly ingests passive behavioral and biometric data from wearables (e.g., Oura, Whoop, Apple Watch) without requiring user input, enabling background monitoring of mental health signals.

description.value: SIGNAL models individual baselines rather than population averages and detects meaningful deviation patterns 3–7 days before subjective symptoms appear, using cross-domain signal correlation and longitudinal tracking.

citations.content: SIGNAL models individual baselines rather than population averages and detects meaningful deviation patterns 3–7 days before subjective symptoms appear, using cross-domain signal correlation and longitudinal tracking.

description.value: SIGNAL delivers a single, specific, physical, non-alarming action calibrated to the user’s current state to support timely, safe, and proportionate behavioral change.

citations.content: SIGNAL delivers a single, specific, physical, non-alarming action calibrated to the user’s current state to support timely, safe, and proportionate behavioral change.

description.value: Continuous passive ingestion of wearable data streams via APIs with no user input.

citations.content: Continuous passive ingestion of wearable data streams via APIs with no user input.

description.value: Idiographic modeling (individual baselines) using passive signals plus population priors; builds a persistent longitudinal human state representation.

citations.content: Idiographic modeling (individual baselines) using passive signals plus population priors; builds a persistent longitudinal human state representation.

description.value: Detects meaningful deviations from individual baselines and contextual risk; can flag 3–7 days early.

citations.content: Detects meaningful deviations from individual baselines and contextual risk; can flag 3–7 days early.

description.value: Multi-agent negotiation and resolution to produce a single safe, proportionate micro-intervention output.

citations.content: Multi-agent negotiation and resolution to produce a single safe, proportionate micro-intervention output.

description.value: Delivers one specific, physical, timely, non-alarming nudge as the active output.

citations.content: Delivers one specific, physical, timely, non-alarming nudge as the active output.
